spec.description: A dashboard visualizing the 2026 Eurovision Song Contest Final, held in Vienna Austria on 16th May 2026.

spec.expression:
SELECT
  artist_name
FROM
  A
WHERE country = "${country}"

SELECT
  song_title
FROM
  A
WHERE country = "${country}"

SELECT COUNT(*) + 1 AS country_rank
FROM (
  SELECT recipient_country, SUM(points) AS total_points
  FROM A
  GROUP BY recipient_country
) AS all_totals
WHERE total_points > (
  SELECT SUM(points)
  FROM A
  WHERE recipient_country = "${country}"
)

SELECT
  CONCAT(voting_country, ' (', vote_type, ')') as name,
  points
FROM A
WHERE recipient_country = "${country}"
  AND points > 0
ORDER BY points DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  recipient_country as name,
  points
FROM A
WHERE voting_country = "${country}"
  AND vote_type = 'jury'
  AND points > 0
ORDER BY points DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  recipient_country as name,
  points
FROM A
WHERE voting_country = "${country}"
  AND vote_type = 'televote'
  AND points > 0
ORDER BY points DESC
LIMIT 100
SELECT recipient_country FROM A GROUP BY recipient_country ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT recipient_country FROM A GROUP BY recipient_country ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT vote_type, SUM(points) AS total FROM A WHERE recipient_country IN (SELECT recipient_country FROM A GROUP BY recipient_country ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1) GROUP BY vote_type

SELECT CAST(points AS CHAR) AS points, COUNT(*) AS count FROM A WHERE recipient_country IN (SELECT recipient_country FROM A GROUP BY recipient_country ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1) AND points > 0 GROUP BY points ORDER BY CAST(points AS UNSIGNED) DESC
SELECT CONCAT(SUM(points), ' pts') AS total FROM A WHERE recipient_country IN (SELECT recipient_country FROM A GROUP BY recipient_country ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT LOWER(recipient_country) AS winning_country FROM A GROUP BY recipient_country ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.youtube_id 
FROM A 
WHERE A.country = 
  (SELECT recipient_country 
   FROM B 
   GROUP BY recipient_country 
   ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1
  ) LIMIT 1

options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

spec.expression: SELECT recipient_country FROM A GROUP BY recipient_country ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC LIMIT 1

spec.expression:

  CONCAT(sum(points), ' pts') as points_total
FROM
  A
WHERE recipient_country = "${country}"

SELECT
  running_order
FROM
  A
WHERE country = "${country}"
